name: Overall GOAT
description: The greatest footballer of all time, across all dimensions.

name: Attacker GOAT
description: The greatest forward, striker, or winger to ever play the game.

name: Midfielder GOAT
description: The greatest central or attacking midfielder in football history.

name: Defender GOAT
description: The greatest defender the sport has ever produced.

name: Best Big Match Player
description: Who performed most when the stakes were highest — finals, semi-finals, decisive moments.

name: Most Technical
description: Pure skill — dribbling, touch, close control, technique beyond what physics should allow.

name: Best Leader
description: Who elevated those around them most — on and off the pitch.

name: Most Influential
description: Who changed football most — tactically, culturally, historically.
